name: porchlyte-agents

owner.name: Tracy with PorchLyte + Agent Social Haus

description: The AI Agent system for real estate agents: the Foundation (Voice, Brand, Local) plus the nine-person AI Agent Team. Install once, update automatically.

plugins.name: ai-agent-foundation
plugins.description: The AI Agent Foundation: three skills (Voice, Brand, Local) that personalize how Claude writes for you. The required base for the AI Agent Team plugin.

author.name: Tracy with PorchLyte + Agent Social Haus

plugins.name: ai-agent-team
plugins.description: The AI Agent Team: a nine-person AI team for real estate agents (Ella, Darla, Chloe, Poppy, Treena, Lia, Sloane, Rhonda, Olivia). Requires the AI Agent Foundation plugin installed first.

author.name: Tracy with PorchLyte + Agent Social Haus
